name: com.bidscube.sdk
description: Bidscube advertising for Unity — two integration paths: (1) Direct SDK — C# APIs for banner, fullscreen video/VAST, native, and interstitials against your SSP. (2) AppLovin MAX — Bidscube as a custom mediated network; Android ships the MAX adapter AAR; Unity Editor injects com.bidscube:bidscube-sdk as @aar by default (Constants.NativeAndroidBidscubeSdkVersion) or optional local/custom Gradle via BidscubeAndroidGradlePostprocessor.CoreDependencyMode; AppLovin SDK 13.x, Media3, IMA, UMP, Glide, Material; launcher coreLibraryDesugaring injected by default (NoDesugarMode=true skips). iOS uses bundled WebView plugins and optional CocoaPods BidscubeSDKAppLovin. UPM 1.0.6: Android Gradle @aar + launcher desugaring for CheckAarMetadata; use Git tag v1.0.6.

samples.description: Example scenes and scripts demonstrating the Bidscube Unity SDK.
